name: Professional Blog Posting Engine
description: Prometheus editorial workflow for producing publication-ready business blog posts, SEO articles, local SEO posts, thought-leadership pieces, comparison articles, how-to guides, internal-linking plans, schema suggestions, social promotion assets, and QA reports.

draft a blog for my company

resources.description: Observed example for verifying an existing website blog repo/content model before creating an ongoing blog-poster agent or staging posts.
